definitions.text: The third-person singular neuter personal pronoun used to refer to an inanimate object, abstract entity, or non-human living thing.
examples: Take this book and put it on the shelf.
Take each day as it comes.

definitions.text: A third-person singular personal pronoun used to refer to a baby or child, especially of unknown gender.
examples: She took the baby and held it in her arms.

definitions.text: A third-person singular pronoun used to refer to an unspecified person.
One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.
The person who chases and tries to catch the other players in the playground game of tag.
examples: In the next game, Adam and Tom will be it…

definitions.text: Most fashionable, popular, or in vogue.
